---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# basic

```{julia}
# multithreading
using Base.Threads
Threads.nthreads() # the number of threads.
@elapsed @threads for i in 1:4 # return time used.
    sleep(1)
end
```

```{julia}
# Combines with 
@showprogress desc="Processing..." enabled=true @threads for i in 1:100
    sleep(0.1)
end
```
